moduleDescription: This module contains Nim's support for locks and condition vars.

entries.name: Lock
entries.description: Nim lock; whether this is re-entrant or not is unspecified!

entries.name: initLock
entries.code: proc initLock(lock: var Lock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: deinitLock
entries.code: proc deinitLock(lock: Lock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Frees the resources associated with the lock.

entries.name: tryAcquire
entries.code:
proc tryAcquire(lock: var Lock): bool {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}
entries.description: Tries to acquire the given lock. Returns true on success.

entries.name: acquire
entries.code: proc acquire(lock: var Lock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: release
entries.code: proc release(lock: var Lock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: initCond
entries.code: proc initCond(cond: var Cond) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: deinitCond
entries.code: proc deinitCond(cond: Cond) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Frees the resources associated with the condition variable.

entries.name: wait
entries.code:
proc wait(cond: var Cond; lock: var Lock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Waits on the condition variable cond.

entries.name: signal
entries.code: proc signal(cond: var Cond) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Sends a signal to the condition variable cond.

entries.name: broadcast
entries.code: proc broadcast(cond: var Cond) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Unblocks all threads currently blocked on the specified condition variable cond.

entries.name: withLock
entries.description: Acquires the given lock, executes the statements in body and releases the lock after the statements finish executing.
